name: YahooFinanceNews
description: Use this tool to search for financial news articles about a specific stock ticker symbol using Yahoo Finance. Input must be a valid stock ticker (e.g., AAPL, TSLA, MSFT). Returns a list of recent news headlines and summaries for the given ticker.

query.description: A valid stock ticker symbol to search news for, e.g. 'AAPL'.

return_type: str — a formatted string of recent news headlines and summaries for the ticker
